ideasThisWeek:
How opportunity is everywhere and you need to start something. 

How sales is so important.

settings.toneOfVoice:
Voice: direct, founder-native, honest. No fluff.
Tone varies — challenging, excited, off-the-cuff, storytelling.
Short punchy sentences. Rhetorical questions.
Speak like someone who has been in the trenches, not a polished presenter.
settings.hooks: This is your Last opportunity to create wealth.  The world is not waiting for you.
settings.generalThemes:
Core topics: startup validation, building with AI, founder mindset, idea testing.
Target audience: early-stage founders, aspiring entrepreneurs.
Avoid: generic hustle content, vague inspiration.
